title: Complete the deviation catalog: run grill-with-docs against a scratch Instance
description: to-prd and to-issues deviations are cataloged in PRD-001 Further Notes. Run grill-with-docs through a real Work Grill on a scratch Instance and file every structure mismatch (docs/adr hardcode, CONTEXT-MAP convention, anything new) as an issue. Acceptance: each mismatch is one backlog issue with the observed behavior quoted.
notes: HITL — a grill requires the user. Covers PRD-001 story 10. Depends on EXEC-023 per Brooks's ruling 2026-06-07: the deviation catalog targets the final flat shape. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-4): six deviations from grill-with-docs's three reference files filed as EXEC-024…029; fork direction + glossary-format adoption ruled live by Brooks.
